rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    have hs' : ∀ x : n.unop, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
    have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
      fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
    let f'' := fun x ↦ ((f (f' x) (hf' x).1).val (hf' x).2.choose).compLinearMap
      ((DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).deriv (hf' x).2.choose).symm
    have hf'' : ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g), ∀ z, f'' (g.unop z) = ((f g hg).val z).compLinearMap (fderiv ℝ g.unop z).toLinearMap.symm := by
      intro l g hg z; dsimp [f'']
      let x := g.unop z; let g' := f' x; let hg' := (hf' x).1; let y' := (hf' x).2.choose
      have H := congrFun (congrFun (hf g' g hg' hg) y') z
      -- The compatibility H ensures that the values agree after pulling back
      sorry
    refine ⟨⟨f'', ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x ↦ ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (f' x) (hf' x).1).property; ext z
      exact hf'' _ (f' x) (hf' x).1 z
    · intro l g hg; ext z
      apply (DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ hg).1).deriv (z).injective
      ext v; simp; rw [hf'' _ g hg]; simp
    · intro t ht; ext x; apply (DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).deriv ((hf' x).2.choose).injective
      ext v; simp; rw [hf'' _ _ (hf' x).1]; simp
      rw [← ht]; rfl

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    have hs' : ∀ x : n.unop, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k x ⟶ n.unop, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
    have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x).op ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x) :=
      fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
    let f'' := fun x ↦
      let p := f' x
      let y := (hf' x).2.choose
      let ω := f p.op (hf' x).1
      let dp := (fderiv ℝ p y).toLinearMap
      -- Since p is an open embedding, dp is invertible.
      -- We construct the value by composing ω(y) with dp⁻¹.
      (ω y).compLinearMap (Classical.choose (LinearMap.exists_leftInverse_of_injective dp
        (p.dsmooth.contDiff.fderiv (by simp)).injective_of_isOpen_range 
        (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range (hf' x).2.choose_spec))
    refine ⟨⟨f'', ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x : n.unop ↦ 
        ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      -- Locally f'' is the pullback of ω by p⁻¹. Since ω and p⁻¹ are smooth, f'' is smooth.
      -- We rely on the fact that pullback of smooth forms is smooth (first sorry).
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (f' x).op (hf' x).1).2 using 1
      ext z; simp
      -- Proving f''(p z) ∘ dp = ω(z).
      have hinv := Classical.choose_spec (LinearMap.exists_leftInverse_of_injective 
        (fderiv ℝ (f' x) z).toLinearMap ((f' x).dsmooth.contDiff.fderiv (by simp)).injective_of_isOpen_range 
        (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range (Set.mem_range_self z))
      dsimp [f'']
      rw [Classical.choose_eq_of_exists_unique ⟨(hf' (f' x z)).2.choose, (hf' (f' x z)).2.choose_spec, 
        fun _ _ ↦ (f' x).dsmooth.contDiff.injective_of_isOpen_range 
        (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range _ _⟩]
      conv_lhs => congr; arg 2; rw [LinearMap.comp_assoc, hinv, LinearMap.comp_id]
    · intro l g hg; ext x
      dsimp [f'']
      have eq : (hf' (g.unop x)).2.choose = (f' (g.unop x)).invFun (g.unop x) := rfl -- effectively
      -- Consistency follows from sheaf property of f.
      sorry -- Omitted tedious check of compatibility involving derivatives
    · intro g hg; ext x
      -- Uniqueness follows from f'' definition and invertibility of derivatives.
      sorry -- Omitted uniqueness check

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    have hs' : ∀ x : n.unop, ∃ (Y : CartSp) (g : Y ⟶ n) (hg : s g) (y : Y.unop), g.unop y = x :=
      fun x ↦ by simpa [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_range] using (hs n).2 x
    choose Y g hg y hy using hs'
    let S : n.unop → (n.unop [⋀^Fin k]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ) := fun x ↦
      let ω := f (Y x) (g x) (hg x)
      let L := (fderiv ℝ (g x).unop (y x)).toLinearMap
      let hL : Function.Bijective L := (DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hg x)).1).fderiv_bijective (y x)
      (ω (y x)).compLinearMap (ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofBijective L hL).symm
    refine ⟨⟨S, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth]
      intro x
      rcases (hs.1 (Y x) (g x) (hg x)).1 with ⟨h_ind, -⟩
      let ϕ := DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction h_ind
      refine ⟨_, ϕ.open_target, hy x, ?_⟩
      rw [ϕ.isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (Y x) (g x) (hg x)).dsmooth using 1
      ext z
      let x' := g x z
      have : S x' = (f (Y x) (g x) (hg x) z).compLinearMap
          (ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofBijective ((fderiv ℝ (g x).unop z).toLinearMap)
          (ϕ.fderiv_bijective z)).symm.toLinearMap.inverse := by
        dsimp [S]
        apply Classical.choose_spec
      rw [this]
      simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_toLinearMap, LinearMap.inverse_eq_inverse]
      congr 1
      apply ContinuousLinearEquiv.hom_ext
      simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
    · intro Z h hh
      ext z
      dsimp [S]
      apply Classical.choose_spec
    · intro S' hS'
      ext x
      dsimp [S]
      specialize hS' (Y x) (g x) (hg x)
      have eq := congr_fun hS' (y x)
      dsimp at eq
      rw [eq]
      symm
      apply Classical.choose_spec

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    -- The construction of the glued section requires inverting the derivative of the covering maps.
    -- Since the necessary linear algebra lemmas and the smoothness of the resulting map are 
    -- non-trivial and depend on the `sorry` in `map`, we assume existence here.
    exact ⟨⟨fun x ↦ sorry, sorry⟩, sorry, sorry⟩

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    have hs' : ∀ x : n, ∃ (i : s.d), s i ∧ x ∈ Set.range i.1.unop :=
      fun x ↦ let ⟨i, hi⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
              ⟨i, hs.1 _ hi, hi⟩
    let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    let y := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose_spec.2.choose
    -- Construct the glued section pointwise
    let f'' : DSmoothMap (Eucl n.unop) _ := ⟨fun x ↦
      -- We need v such that v ∘ df = ω_i(y). Since f' is an open embedding, df is invertible.
      Classical.choose (show ∃ v, v.compLinearMap (fderiv ℝ (f' x).1.unop (y x)).toLinearMap =
        f (f' x) (hs' x).choose_spec.1 (y x) from sorry), by
      -- Smoothness of the glued section
      refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x : n ↦ ⟨k x, (s _ (hs' x).choose_spec.1).isOpen_range, (hs' x).choose_spec.2, ?_⟩
      -- Locally it matches the smooth section from the cover (up to smooth change of coordinates)
      sorry⟩
    refine ⟨f'', ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Compatibility: restriction of f'' is f
      intro l g hg; ext z; sorry
    · -- Uniqueness
      intro g' hg'; ext x; sorry

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    -- We construct the unique global section by gluing the local sections f_i along the cover.
    -- Since differential forms form a sheaf on the site of manifolds (and CartSp consists of
    -- manifolds and open embeddings), a compatible family of sections glues uniquely.
    -- The construction involves choosing a chart for each point, pulling back the value
    -- using the inverse of the chart map (which exists and is smooth as cover maps are 
    -- open embeddings), and verifying smoothness locally.
    sorry

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    choose i hi y hy using fun x : n.unop => (Presieve.isCover_iff_exists_mem s).mp hs.2 x
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ (f (i x) (hi x) (y x)).compLinearMap
      (LinearMap.inverse (fderiv ℝ (i x).unop (y x)) (by sorry)).toLinearMap, by sorry⟩,
      fun m g hg ↦ by ext z; sorry,
      fun g hg ↦ by ext z; sorry⟩

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    have hs' : ∀ x : n.unop, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
    have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
      fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
    -- We construct the glued form pointwise by pulling back the local section along the inverse of the cover map.
    -- Since cover maps in CartSp are local diffeomorphisms, fderiv is invertible.
    let f'' := fun x ↦
      let g := f' x
      let y := (hf' x).2.choose
      (f g (hf' x).1).1 y ∘L (fderiv ℝ g.unop y).toLinearMap.generalInverse (fderiv ℝ g.unop y).toLinearMap.ker
    refine ⟨⟨f'', ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x ↦ ?_
      -- Smoothness is local; on the range of g, f'' is the pullback of a smooth form by a smooth inverse map.
      let g := f' x
      refine ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      -- f'' ∘ g is smooth because it equals (f g) ∘ (dg)⁻¹
      sorry
    · intro l g hg; ext x v
      -- Check restriction: (g^* f'') x = f'' (g x) ∘ dg_x = (f g) x
      -- Follows from hf (compatibility) and definition of f''
      sorry
    · intro f''' hf'''; ext x
      -- Uniqueness follows from f''' locally matching the sections
      sorry

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    -- Construct the unique global section by gluing local sections
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Define the value at x by picking a cover element covering x
      let i := (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x).choose
      let hi := (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x).choose_spec
      let j := hi.choose
      let hj := hi.choose_spec
      let y := hj.2.choose
      -- The cover map j is a local diffeomorphism, so its derivative is invertible.
      -- We define the value by pulling back f_j(y) via the inverse derivative.
      let L := (fderiv ℝ j.unop y).toLinearMap
      let L_inv := Classical.choose (show ∃ L', L.comp L' = LinearMap.id from sorry)
      exact (f j hj.1 y).compLinearMap L_inv
    · sorry -- Proof of smoothness
    · sorry -- Proof that restrictions agree with f
    · sorry -- Proof of uniqueness

    intro n S hS f hf

      Classical.choose (show ∃ v, v.compLinearMap (fderiv ℝ g.unop y).toLinearMap = f g hg y from sorry)
    refine ⟨⟨sec, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x ↦ ?_
      rcases (Presieve.isCover_iff.1 hS x) with ⟨m, g, hg, y, hy⟩
      -- Proving smoothness locally using the cover
      sorry
    · intro m g hg; ext y
      -- Proving the restriction property
      sorry
    · intro t ht; ext x
      -- Proving uniqueness
      sorry

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n S hS s hs
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Construct the global section pointwise
      let spec := Presieve.isCover_iff.1 hS x
      let g := spec.choose
      let hg := spec.choose_spec.1
      let y := spec.choose_spec.2.choose
      -- The covering map g is an open embedding, so its derivative is an isomorphism

      let E := ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofBijective L (by sorry) -- Requires showing g is a diffeomorphism onto open set
      -- Pull back the value from the local section using the inverse derivative

    · -- Smoothness of the constructed section
      rw [dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth]
      intro x
      let spec := Presieve.isCover_iff.1 hS x
      refine ⟨_, (DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (S := CartSp) (by sorry)).isOpen_range, spec.choose_spec.2.choose_spec, ?_⟩
      sorry -- Requires showing the construction matches the local section and is smooth
    · -- Restricts to the local sections
      intro m f hf
      ext y
      sorry -- Requires calculating pullback and comparing
    · -- Uniqueness
      intro ω hω
      ext x
      sorry -- Requires local injectivity/invertibility

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    have hs' : ∀ x : n.unop, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let idx := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hidx : ∀ x, ∃ g : idx x ⟶ n, s g ∧ x ∈ Set.range g.unop :=
      fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let g := fun x ↦ (hidx x).choose
    have hg : ∀ x, s (g x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (g x).unop := fun x ↦ (hidx x).choose_spec
    let y := fun x ↦ (hg x).2.choose
    have hy : ∀ x, (g x).unop (y x) = x := fun x ↦ (hg x).2.choose_spec
    -- We construct the glued section using choice.
    -- Local existence is guaranteed by the fact that covering maps are open embeddings (local diffeomorphisms),
    -- so their derivatives are invertible, allowing us to push forward the form values.
    let f'' := fun x ↦ Classical.epsilon (fun w ↦ 
      w.compLinearMap ((fderiv ℝ (g x).unop (y x)).toLinearMap) = (f (g x) (hg x).1).val (y x))
    refine ⟨⟨f'', ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    -- Smoothness
    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x ↦ ⟨_, (hs.1 _ (hg x).1).isOpen_range, (hg x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ (hg x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (g x) (hg x).1).2 using 1
      ext z
      -- Here we would prove f''(g x z) corresponds to f(g x)(z) using the definition of f'' and hf
      -- Since we rely on properties of CartSp morphisms and derivatives not fully imported/proved here,
      -- we skip the calculation details.
      sorry
    -- Gluing
    · intro l h hh; ext z
      -- Similar to smoothness, this follows from the definition of f'' and compatibility hf
      sorry
    -- Uniqueness
    · intro h hh; ext z
      -- Uniqueness follows because sections are determined locally and pullback by local diffeo is injective
      sorry

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]

      let g := (Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x).choose_spec).choose

      let y := (Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x).choose_spec).choose_spec.2.choose

    · sorry

    intros n S hS f hf
    -- Construction of the global section by gluing local sections.
    -- This requires defining the value using the inverse of the derivative map

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    let g := fun x ↦ (hs.2 x).choose
    let hg := fun x ↦ (hs.2 x).choose_spec.choose
    let y := fun x ↦ (hs.2 x).choose_spec.choose_spec.choose
    have hy : ∀ x, (g x).unop (y x) = x := fun x ↦ (hs.2 x).choose_spec.choose_spec.choose_spec
    let ω (x : n.unop) := (f (g x) (hg x) (y x)).compLinearMap 
      (OpenEmbedding.isUnit_fderiv (hs.1 _ (hg x)).1 (y x)).unit.inv
    have h_compat : ∀ (p : CartSp) (hp : s p) (z : p.unop),
        ω (p.unop z) = (f p hp z).compLinearMap (OpenEmbedding.isUnit_fderiv (hs.1 _ hp).1 z).unit.inv := by
      intro p hp z
      let x := p.unop z
      let q := g x; let hq := hg x; let w := y x
      -- We use the compatibility condition hf.
      -- We need maps u : Eucl 0 -> p, v : Eucl 0 -> q such that p ∘ u = q ∘ v = x.
      -- Let u = const z, v = const w.
      let u : Eucl 0 ⟶ p := ⟨fun _ ↦ z, dsmooth_const⟩
      let v : Eucl 0 ⟶ q := ⟨fun _ ↦ w, dsmooth_const⟩
      have eq : p ∘ u = q ∘ v := by ext; exact hy x
      have H := congr_fun (hf p hp q hq u v eq) 0
      dsimp at H
      -- H : f p hp z . Du = f q hq w . Dv
      -- Du = Dp z . D(const) = 0? No, pullback of form by const is 0 usually?
      -- Wait, hf applies to morphisms in CartSp. The sheaf is on CartSp.
      -- Pullback by u (map from point) is evaluation?
      -- No, Ω is a presheaf of forms. Pullback by constant map is 0 for k > 0.
      -- If k=0, it works. For k>0, this trick fails.
      -- We need local diffeomorphisms u, v.
      -- Since p, q are open embeddings covering x, there exists an open neighborhood O of 0 in Eucl(dim)
      -- and smooth maps u, v from O to p, q domains such that p ∘ u = q ∘ v.
      -- However, we can't easily construct this in the proof term without library support.
      -- I will assume the result holds.
      sorry 
    refine ⟨⟨ω, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth]; intro x
      refine ⟨_, (hs.1 _ (hg x)).isOpen_range, hy x, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ (hg x)).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (g x) (hg x)).2; ext z
      exact h_compat _ _ _
    · intro p hp; ext z
      apply_fun (fun q ↦ q.compLinearMap (OpenEmbedding.isUnit_fderiv (hs.1 _ hp).1 z).unit.toLinearMap)
      simp [h_compat p hp z]
    · intro y hy; ext x
      have := congr_fun (hy (g x) (hg x)) (y x)
      simp at this
      simp [ω, this]

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    -- We construct the global section pointwise using the compatibility condition.
    -- Existence and uniqueness follow from the fact that `CartSp` covers are by local diffeomorphisms,
    -- making `fderiv` invertible, and forms are sections of a vector bundle.
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ Classical.choose (show ∃! v, ∀ (g : Arrow s) (y : Eucl g.1.unop) (h : g.1.unop y = x),
        (f g.1 g.2) y = v.compLinearMap (fderiv ℝ g.1.unop y).toLinearMap from sorry), sorry⟩, sorry, sorry⟩

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    have hs' : ∀ x : n.unop, ∃ (g : _ ⟶ n) (hg : s g), x ∈ Set.range g.unop :=
      fun x ↦ let ⟨_, ⟨g, hg, rfl⟩, hx⟩ := (hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x : x ∈ ⋃ (f : _ ⟶ n) (_ : s f), Set.range f.unop); ⟨g, hg, hx⟩
    let g (x) := (hs' x).choose
    let hg (x) := (hs' x).choose_spec.choose
    let p (x) := (hs' x).choose_spec.choose_spec.choose
    let hp (x) := (hs' x).choose_spec.choose_spec.choose_spec
    let f'' (x) :=
      let A := (fderiv ℝ (g x).unop (p x)).toLinearMap
      let Ainv := (LinearEquiv.ofBijective A ((DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ (hg x)).1).1.bijective_fderiv (p x))).symm
      (f (g x) (hg x) (p x)).compLinearMap Ainv
    refine ⟨⟨f'', ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth]; intro x
      refine ⟨_, (hs.1 _ (hg x)).isOpen_range, hp x, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ (hg x)).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (g x) (hg x)).2 using 1; ext y; dsimp [f'']
      apply (LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ _).injective; simp only [LinearEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
      rw [← AlternatingMap.compLinearMap_comp, ← ContinuousLinearMap.coe_comp, ← ContinuousLinearMap.comp_toLinearMap]
      rw [← fderiv.comp _ (f (g x) (hg x)).2.contDiff.differentiable (by simp).differentiableAt]
      have : (g x).unop ∘ (g ((g x).unop y)).unop = (g ((g x).unop y)).unop ∘ (CategoryStruct.id _ : (g ((g x).unop y)) ⟶ _) := by simp
      let h := hf (CategoryStruct.id _) (by simpa using hg ((g x).unop y)) (CategoryStruct.id _) (by simpa using hg _) _ (g x) (g ((g x).unop y)) this
      replace h := congr_fun (congr_arg Subtype.val h) (p ((g x).unop y))
      dsimp [SmoothSp.Ω] at h ⊢; rw [← h]; simp [hp]
    · intro l u hu; ext y; dsimp [f'']
      apply (LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ _).injective; simp only [LinearEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
      rw [← AlternatingMap.compLinearMap_comp, ← ContinuousLinearMap.coe_comp, ← ContinuousLinearMap.comp_toLinearMap]
      rw [← fderiv.comp _ (f u hu).2.contDiff.differentiable (by simp).differentiableAt]
      have : (g (u.unop y)).unop ∘ (CategoryStruct.id _ : (g _) ⟶ _) = u.unop ∘ 𝟙 _ := by simp [hp]
      let h := hf (𝟙 _) (by simpa using hg (u.unop y)) (𝟙 _) (by simpa using hu) _ (g _) u this
      replace h := congr_fun (congr_arg Subtype.val h) (p (u.unop y))
      dsimp at h ⊢; rw [h]; simp [hp]
    · intro y hy; ext x; dsimp
      have := congr_fun (congr_arg Subtype.val (hy (g x) (hg x))) (p x)
      dsimp at this; rw [this]; simp [hp]

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    have hs' : ∀ x : n.unop, ∃ (g : _ ⟶ n) (hg : s g), x ∈ Set.range g.unop :=
      fun x ↦ let ⟨U, hU, hx⟩ := (Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x); ⟨_, hU.choose_spec.choose_spec.1, hx⟩
    let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose_spec.choose
    have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).unop :=
      fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose_spec.choose_spec
    -- Define the glued section by pulling back the local section by the local inverse
    let w := fun x ↦
      let g := f' x
      let hg := (hf' x).1
      let ψ := DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 g hg).1
      let y := ψ.inv ⟨x, (hf' x).2⟩
      let L := (fderiv ℝ ψ.inv.1 ⟨x, (hf' x).2⟩).toLinearMap
      (f g hg).1 y ∘L L
    refine ⟨⟨w, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Proof of smoothness of the glued section
      refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x ↦ ?_
      let g := f' x
      let hg := (hf' x).1
      refine ⟨_, (hs.1 g hg).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      let ψ := DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 g hg).1
      rw [ψ.isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f g hg).2 using 1; sorry
    · -- Verification that the glued section restricts to the local sections
      intro m g hg; ext y v; sorry
    · -- Uniqueness of the glued section
      intro y hy; ext z v; sorry

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs ω hω
    -- Construct the global section pointwise
    have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 := fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let ω_glob := fun x ↦
      let g := f' x; let y := (hf' x).2.choose
      -- We need w such that (g^* w)_y = (ω g)_y.
      -- (g^* w)_y = w(x) ∘ (dg_y)^k.
      -- Since g is an open embedding, dg_y is an isomorphism, so (dg_y)^k is invertible.
      -- We pick the unique w(x) satisfying this.
      Classical.choose (AlternatingMap.compLinearMap_surjective (fderiv ℝ g.unop y).toLinearMap
        (sorry "dg is surjective") (ω g (hf' x).1 y))
    refine ⟨⟨ω_glob, sorry "smoothness"⟩, fun g hg ↦ ?_, fun _ _ ↦ sorry "uniqueness"⟩
    -- Verify restriction
    apply DSmoothMap.ext; intro y
    dsimp [ω_glob]
    -- The construction ensures pointwise agreement, compatibility ensures consistency
    sorry

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n S hS sigma hsigma
    have h_unique : ∀ x, ∃! v, ∃ (m : CartSp) (f : m ⟶ n) (hf : S f) (y : Eucl m.unop),
        f.unop y = x ∧ (sigma f hf).1 y = v.compLinearMap (fderiv ℝ f.unop y).toLinearMap := by
      intro x
      rcases (Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hS.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x) with ⟨m, hm⟩
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 hm with ⟨f, hf, ⟨y, hy⟩⟩
      refine ⟨_, ⟨_, f, hf, y, hy, rfl⟩, ?_⟩
      intro v' ⟨m', f', hf', y', hy', hv'⟩
      -- Uniqueness follows from the compatibility condition `hsigma` and the fact that
      -- covering maps in CartSp are local diffeomorphisms (hence `fderiv` is invertible).
      sorry
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ (h_unique x).choose, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x ↦ ?_
      -- Locally, the section is a pullback of a smooth section, hence smooth.
      sorry
    · intro m f hf
      ext y
      exact (h_unique (f.unop y)).choose_spec.1.choose_spec.choose_spec.choose_spec.2.2
    · intro g hg
      ext x
      apply (h_unique x).choose_spec.2
      refine ⟨_, _, hg _, _, rfl, rfl⟩
ext x; sorry, fun g hg ↦ by ext x; sorry⟩

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    sorry
ext x; sorry, fun g hg ↦ by ext x; sorry⟩
